learnings.title: Switches and gates
learnings.focus: Flip switches through different gates and see what turns the lamp on.
lookFor: Flips a switch and watches the lamp
Says what turned the lamp on
Predicts whether the lamp lights for each gate
Follows a signal through a chain of gates
Finds more than one way to turn the lamp on

playgrounds.note: Flip the switches and see which gates turn the lamp on

learnings.title: Times of day
learnings.focus: Talk about morning, noon and night and watch the sky change through the day.
lookFor: Names morning, afternoon, evening and night
Watches the sky change from day to dark
Knows AM is before midday and PM is midday to midnight
Talks about when different people work (baker early, farmer feeds animals)
Links a time to something they do

playgrounds.note: Watch the sky change and talk about morning, noon and night

learnings.title: Animal names
learnings.focus: Learn and name farm and wild animals.
lookFor: Names a farm animal
Names a wild animal
Hears and repeats an animal name
Tells a farm animal from a wild one

playgrounds.note: Trace and say the names of farm and wild animals
Spell out animal names letter by letter
Listen and name farm and safari animals

learnings.title: Everyday words
learnings.focus: Learn words for vehicles, food and the people who help us.
lookFor: Names a vehicle
Names a fruit or food
Names a person who helps us
Names doctor's-kit objects like a plaster or bandage
Names an exotic fruit and where it grows
Uses a new everyday word

playgrounds.note: Trace and say words for vehicles, food and helpers
Build words for vehicles, food and helpers
Listen and name fruit, vehicles and helpers
